# MyTracksy

MyTracksy is a Sri Lankan profession-specific finance and operations platform.

Canonical site: https://mytracksy.lk/

## Public pages
- Home: https://mytracksy.lk/
- Medical landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/medical
- Legal landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/legal
- Engineering landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/engineering
- Business landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/business
- Individual landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/individual
- Trading landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/trading
- Automotive landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/automotive
- Marketing landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/marketing
- Travel landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/travel
- Transportation landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/transportation
- Retail landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/retail
- Aquaculture landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/aquaculture
- Creator landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/creator
- LensTracksy studios landing page: https://mytracksy.lk/studios

## Focus
- Profession-specific workflows for Sri Lankan users
- Mobile-friendly PWA experience
- Income, expenses, reporting, and tax-ready exports
- Medical workflow support for doctors and clinics
- Photography studio workflows for wedding and commercial teams

## Crawl guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs on the `mytracksy.lk` domain.
- Public landing pages can be indexed and summarized.
- Admin and internal login utility pages are not public documentation targets.
